query: extreme overexposure blown out highlights white sky photograph
message: anti_aesthetics/lighting: exposure extremes — overexposed/blown highlights, silhouettes against white sky, washed-out high-key minimalism

response.objective_caption: A woman with shoulder-length light brown hair faces the camera, wearing large hoop earrings, a circular pendant necklace, and a white sleeveless top, with her left hand raised to the back of her head against a bright, featureless backdrop.
response.anti_aesthetic_caption: A woman with shoulder-length light brown hair faces the camera, wearing large hoop earrings, a circular pendant necklace, and a white sleeveless top, with her left hand raised to the back of her head. The photograph is extremely overexposed, blowing out the background and clothing into near-pure white, while the faded, washed-out palette and low vibrancy give the scene a pale, low-contrast appearance with lost highlight detail.
